name: spider
description: Spider-shaped text-to-SQL: a cross-domain natural-language question over a small inline database, scored by execution accuracy (the predicted query's result set equals the gold query's). The predicted SQL (recorded) is a semantic variant of the gold, so the score reflects execution — not string — match. Self-contained and offline; structurally a miniature of the real Spider task.

tasks.prompt: How many heads of the departments are older than 56?
tasks.gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM head WHERE age > 56
tasks.recorded: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM head WHERE age >= 57

tasks.prompt: List the names of heads younger than 60 ordered by age.
tasks.gold: SELECT name FROM head WHERE age < 60 ORDER BY age
tasks.recorded: SELECT name FROM head WHERE age <= 59 ORDER BY age ASC

tasks.prompt: How many singers are there from each country?
tasks.gold: SELECT country, COUNT(*) FROM singer GROUP BY country ORDER BY country
tasks.recorded: SELECT country, COUNT(singer_id) AS n FROM singer GROUP BY country ORDER BY country ASC

tasks.prompt: What is the average age of all singers?
tasks.recorded: SELECT AVG(age) AS avg_age FROM singer

tasks.prompt: What is the maximum stadium capacity?
tasks.recorded: SELECT MAX(capacity) AS max_capacity FROM stadium

tasks.prompt: Show the names of stadiums with capacity above 10000.
tasks.gold: SELECT name FROM stadium WHERE capacity > 10000 ORDER BY name
tasks.recorded: SELECT name FROM stadium WHERE capacity >= 10001 ORDER BY name ASC
